content.text:
<user_query>
从 commit a8b2d8d9c95a26df232c8dfa9f0d8a4665f0b321 开始，每个 commit 都提交了多少行代码啊？
</user_query>

正在统计从该 commit 起每个提交的代码行数。

[REDACTED]

input.description: List commits with line stats from base commit

input.command:
cd /Users/bytedance/dev/typescript-go && git log a8b2d8d9c95a26df232c8dfa9f0d8a4665f0b321^..HEAD --pretty=format:"%h|%ad|%s" --date=short --shortstat --reverse | awk -F'|' 'BEGIN{total_add=0;total_del=0} /^[0-9a-f]{8}\|/ {hash=$1; date=$2; msg=$3; getline; if ($0 ~ /files changed/) {match($0, /([0-9]+) insertion/, a); add=a[1]?a[1]:0; match($0, /([0-9]+) deletion/, d); del=d[1]?d[1]:0; net=add-del; total_add+=add; total_del+=del; printf "%s | %s | +%d -%d (净 +%d) | %s
", hash, date, add, del, net, msg}} END{printf "
合计: +%d -%d (净 +%d)
", total_add, total_del, total_add-total_del}'
input.description: Format commit stats chronologically with totals
Get chronological commit stats for parsing

content.text:
从 `a8b2d8d9`（含）到当前 `HEAD` 共 **25 个 commit**，按时间顺序统计如下（数据来自 `git log --shortstat`）：

| # | Commit | 新增 | 删除 | 净增 | 文件数 | 说明 |
|---|--------|------|------|------|--------|------|
| 1 | `a8b2d8d9` | +986 | -77 | +909 | 4 | lsproto ServerCapabilities provider registration-options (P7) |
| 2 | `db677804` | +412 | -44 | +368 | 4 | legacy method-decorator design:paramtypes + __param (6ap) |
| 3 | `5dab7884` | +658 | -14 | +644 | 4 | legacy accessor (get/set) decorator lowering (6aq) |
| 4 | `39e430e8` | +1043 | -30 | +1013 | 4 | lsproto registration-options base tree + all 14 slots (P7) |
| 5 | `68a060e1` | +895 | -20 | +875 | 4 | lsproto WorkspaceOptions subtree + RelativePattern (P7) |
| 6 | `c745da8b` | +724 | -49 | +675 | 4 | legacy class-decorator lowering (6ar) |
| 7 | `ac972fc6` | +292 | -2 | +290 | 6 | checker getNonNullableType + non-null assertion (4ay) |
| 8 | `d50d1aaf` | +1104 | -42 | +1062 | 4 | lsproto request/result param concrete slots (P7) |
| 9 | `ee3f39ee` | +365 | -4 | +361 | 4 | lsproto TextDocumentEdit.edits union (P7) |
| 10 | `1236e9b6` | +787 | -44 | +743 | 9 | checker nullable equality narrowing + possibly-null/undefined diagnostics (4az) |
| 11 | `22c304b0` | +374 | -17 | +357 | 4 | checker nullish refinement + call-receiver non-null + typeof narrowing (4ba) |
| 12 | `0f3b55eb` | +701 | -25 | +676 | 9 | checker discriminated-union narrowing + ?? subtype reduction + 5076 (4bb) |
| 13 | `bdd21253` | +316 | -39 | +277 | 9 | checker literal type interning by value (4bc) |
| 14 | `4ab0ae86` | +447 | -12 | +435 | 6 | checker fresh/regular literal pairing + getWidenedLiteralType (4bd) |
| 15 | `20123d3e` | +304 | -1 | +303 | 4 | checker as const + as T assertion arm (4be) |
| 16 | `f93ab79a` | +508 | -4 | +504 | 6 | checker object/array literal expression typing (4bf) |
| 17 | `b4344ebb` | +679 | -6 | +673 | 8 | checker excess-property check 2353 for fresh object literals (4bg) |
| 18 | `671da8f6` | +575 | -17 | +558 | 4 | checker object-literal shorthand + computed-name index signatures (4bh) |
| 19 | `4cb26230` | +587 | -40 | +547 | 9 | checker as const (const-context) typing of object/array literals (4bi) |
| 20 | `51fb9706` | +1004 | -16 | +988 | 7 | checker contextual typing foundation - contextual parameter types (4bj) |
| 21 | `d76f0773` | +667 | -15 | +652 | 6 | checker contextual typing into object/array literals (4bk) |
| 22 | `a7e7b756` | +478 | -9 | +469 | 4 | checker call-argument contextual typing - callback params (4bl) |
| 23 | `ecabc87c` | +412 | -0 | +412 | 4 | checker class heritage checking - implements 2420 / extends 2415 (4bm) |
| 24 | `99a90449` | +1254 | -36 | +1218 | 7 | checker relation-engine diagnostic elaboration chains (4bn) |
| 25 | `6a56cad2` | +918 | -27 | +891 | 4 | checker element-wise error elaboration for object/array literal RHS (4bo) |

### 汇总

| 指标 | 数值 |
|------|------|
| Commit 数量 | 25 |
| 总新增行 | **16,490** |
| 总删除行 | **590** |
| 净增行 | **15,900** |

### 几个观察

- **最大单次提交**：`99a90449`（+1254 / -36，净 +1218）
- **第二大**：`d50d1aaf`（+1104 / -42，净 +1062）
- **第三大**：`39e430e8`（+1043 / -30，净 +1013）
- **唯一零删除**：`ecabc87c`（纯新增 412 行）
- **删除最少**：`20123d3e`（仅 -1 行）

说明：以上统计基于 `git shortstat`，包含所有被修改文件的行数（含测试代码），不是「有效业务代码」的精确度量。若需要按目录（如只看 `internal/checker/`）或排除测试文件，我可以再帮你筛一版。
